guide:
# Level 1

**Quest NPC:** Sigmor Fallbourne  
Sigmor asks you to get a Wolf Fang Pendant. Merchant Lendal will sell you one for free.

---

# Level 2

**Quest NPC:** Sigmor Fallbourne  
Sigmor sends you to Spiritmaster Barkwillow who binds you and then sends you to Coachman Frendor.

---

# Level 3

**Quest NPC:** Sigmor Fallbourne  
Sigmor wants you to hone your fighting skills. Go out of town and battle badgers, returning with three badger meats.

---

# Level 4

**Quest NPC:** Sigmor Fallbourne  
Sigmor sends you to Stannis Domor, who offers to make you a new bow. Gather the following items:  
- Block of Elm Wood - Purchase from Bowyer Aymrite  
- Silk Twine - Purchase from Tailor Fendhope  
- Fractured Firefly Thorax - Dropped by Fireflies and Emberflies  
- Fractured Snake Fang - Dropped by Grass Vipers

---

# Level 5

**Quest NPC:** Sigmor Fallbourne  
Talk to Sigmor, who sends you to kill Surefall Shamblers (CONs Yellow) and loot their eye. Shamblers roam southwest into the hills or along the outer wall of the glade east then north.

---

# Level 7

**Quest NPC:** Sigmor Fallbourne  
1. Sigmor sends you to Aieari Scoutmaster; locate her and report back findings.  
2. Head SE out of SFG toward the mountain, follow around to a large Sleasher fort. Aieari is on the mountain side near the fort.  
3. Talk to Aieari, which spawns a Gnoll Runner nearby. Kill, loot, return to Aieari.  
4. Return her note to Sigmor.

---

# Level 10

**Quest NPC:** Sigmor Fallbourne  
1. Sigmor sends you to Guard Gaffy at a guard tower west of SFG.  
2. Kill two Outcast Rangers, Gilthar and Brombar (NW of Gaffy), loot A Rusted Blade (lore, no trade). One is enough; give to Gaffy to exchange for arrow shafts, return to Sigmor.  
3. Sigmor sends you to Samnar in Qeynos (run east to Wyndhaven, take coach, then south to Qeynos blacksmith in NW corner). Talk to Samnar, return to Sigmor.  
4. Sigmor sends you to Derosh in Wymondham (exit SFG, run west, head NE past stonehedge). Derosh gives note to return to Surefall.  
5. Sigmor sends you to kill Gnolls at Slesher Fort; Mirgmor Stalker (CON Dark Blue) leads small gnoll force. Kill, loot bow, return to Sigmor.

---

# Level 13

**Quest NPC:** Sigmor Fallbourne  
1. Talk to Sigmor; report to Captain Pejon in second tower north of Qeynos. Follow path north from Qeynos Coachman, past glowing druid ring to guard tower.  
2. Kill Gnoll Elder (triggered spawn, CON Yellow @13) at northern camp, return to Captain Pejon.  
3. Kill Gnoll Blacksmith (CON Yellow @13) at another northern camp, return spear to Captain Pejon.  
4. Froglok meeting: travel near gnoll camp north of Slesher Village (Fogmarsh NE). Two gnolls and three Frogloks; CON White @13 for gnolls, Froglok elder yellow, companions dark blue. Kill all, loot battle plans, return to Captain Pejon, get note for Sigmor.  
5. Return to Sigmor.  
**Reward:** 550,698 XP

---

# Level 15

**Quest NPC:** Sigmor Fallbourne  
1. Talk to Sigmor; travel to Farmer Hops in farmlands (east from Qeynos to Hagley, north on road in Crethley Manor zone, third farm north). Bring 390 tunar.  
2. Slay nearby gnoll raiders, return gnoll raider gloves to Hops (con white/yellow @15).  
3. Speak to Guard Wayosh at guardtower north of Hops farm about other farms.  
4. Kill hungry zombie (CON Red @15) NW of guard, return stolen milk to Wayosh.  
5. Give 260 tunar to Hops, purchase seeds (130 tunar) from Bebbin Mossfoot in Misty Thicket, return to Hops via Waysender Naelarie.  
**Reward:** 883,791 XP

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Sigmor Felborne  
1. Talk to Sigmor; he sends you to Guard Darek in Crethley Manor watchtower (top of 2nd tower).  
2. Kill Syndia (CON Dark Blue) west of Crethley Manor, loot Book of Disease, return to Darek.  
3. Rescue Guard Malvern in basement of Crethley Manor (N); undead con green to yellow @lvl 20, follow him out, speak again.  
4. Kill Abomination (CON White @20) in basement with two dark guards, reanimated beast, and Heretic Beirtich (CON Red), loot shackles, return to Darek.  
5. Kill Scribe Jahar in cellar, loot Dark Journal, return to Darek.  
6. Gather rare herb from Froglok shaman Gugluk (CON White @20) SW of SFG in Fog Marsh, return to Darek.  
7. Gather slime from Slithtar Harvester NE of Wymondham (or due east from Blacksmith), return to Darek, then to Sigmor Felborne.  
**Reward:** 2,814,929 XP, choose between:  
- Sparrow Eye (boosts wisdom, aids ranged accuracy) + Oak Handled Scimitar  
- Strikeblade (temporary combat aid) + Pine Spirit
